ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF with clear text. Both ORIGINAL (page 1) and COPY (page 2) versions present. Using ORIGINAL.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, 3 pages. Clear text. Marked 'ORGINAL' (likely typo for 'ORIGINAL').

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains 'CD711895' and 'DN1167556' which are reference numbers, not LC references. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', or 'Documentary Credit' found.

locations_found: Invoice footer on all pages: 'HydraSpecma AB' under 'Invoice Address'
Invoice page 3 signature area: 'Hydra Specma' logo
consignor_search_result.motivation: The name 'HydraSpecma AB' is explicitly found in the invoice footer 'Invoice Address' block on pages 1, 2, and 3. The brand logo 'Hydra Specma' appears in the header on all pages.

criteria_met: Criterion 1: Certificate remarks contain 'CD711895' which matches invoice number 'CD711895'.
Criterion 2: Certificate consignor 'HydraSpecma AB' identified in invoice footer as 'HydraSpecma AB'.
Criterion 3: Certificate consignee 'Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S' identified in invoice as 'Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S.' (Customer/Delivery Address).
pairing_validation.motivation: All three criteria are met. The document pair is valid.

checkpoints.invoice_value: HydraSpecma AB, Box 164, SE-401 22 GÖTEBORG (Invoice Address footer)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'HydraSpecma AB' anywhere in invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: The name 'HydraSpecma AB' is explicitly found in the invoice footer 'Invoice Address' block on all three pages. The brand logo 'Hydra Specma' also appears in the header.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor name with invoice issuer name.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'HydraSpecma AB'. Invoice footer Invoice Address: 'HydraSpecma AB'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate states 'Sweden'. Invoice footer contains VAT number 'SE5560B9955001' with SE prefix (Sweden), IBAN starting with 'SE', and postal code prefix 'SE-401 22 GÖTEBORG'. All confirm Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Country verified via VAT number SE-prefix and IBAN SE-prefix

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'HydraSpecma AB' in Sweden. Invoice footer 'Invoice Address' block on all pages states 'HydraSpecma AB, Box 164, SE-401 22 GÖTEBORG'. The name is an exact match. Country Sweden is confirmed via SE-prefix in VAT number SE5560B9955001 and IBAN starting with SE. MATCH per rule 4.1.0 and 4.1.2.1.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S, Akhisar Organize Sanayi Bölgesi, Akhisar-Manisa Yolu7km;5. Cadde No33, 45230. Akhisar, Turkiet
checkpoints.invoice_value: Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S., Akhisar Organize Sanayi Bölgesi, Akhisar-Manisa Yolu7km;5.Cadde No33, 45230 AKHISAR, TURKIET (Customer + Delivery Address)

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice has 'Customer' field with 'Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S.' and 'Customer Address' block. No separate 'Invoice to' / 'Bill to' field, but 'Customer' serves as the primary billing party.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice customer name.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S' (without trailing period). Invoice: 'Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S.' (with trailing period). After normalization of punctuation, these are identical. The difference is a trailing period only.
Certificate: 'Turkiet'. Invoice Customer Address: 'TURKIET'. Both refer to Turkey (Turkiet is Turkish in Swedish). After case normalization, identical.

rules_applied.description: Customer field used as primary billing party

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S' in Turkiet. Invoice 'Customer' field: 'Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S.' and Customer Address includes 'TURKIET'. Name match after normalization (only a trailing period differs). Country 'Turkiet' = 'TURKIET' after case normalization. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: 980pcs, Rubberhose & Hose Plastic w or wo fittings; 900pcs, Rubberhose & Hose Plastic w or wo fittings
checkpoints.invoice_value: Pos 1: 401249 Hydraulic hose High Pressure 100 PCE; Pos 2: 132122-900 Rubberhose 300 PCE; Pos 3: 132130-900 Rubberhose 480 PCE; Pos 4: 132131-900 Rubberhose 500 PCE; Pos 5: 132132-900 Rubberhose 500 PCE

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate does not contain specific article/part numbers. It uses generic descriptions 'Rubberhose & Hose Plastic w or wo fittings'.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate and match against invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate main designation: 'Rubberhose & Hose Plastic w or wo fittings'. The identity-bearing term is 'Rubberhose' which appears explicitly in invoice line items (Pos 2-5 all described as 'Rubberhose'). Additionally Pos 1 is described as 'Hydraulic hose High Pressure' — the term 'hose' is present. The certificate uses a collective description covering both 'Rubberhose' and 'Hose Plastic' which encompasses hydraulic hoses and rubber hoses. The word 'Rubberhose' is explicitly found in the invoice for 4 of 5 line items. Pos 1 is described as 'Hydraulic hose' which contains 'hose'. The certificate's description 'Rubberhose & Hose Plastic w or wo fittings' is a generic/collective description covering rubber hoses and hose plastic products with or without fittings.

comparison_steps.description: Check if additional text affects product identity.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate adds 'w or wo fittings' (with or without fittings) and 'Plastic' as qualifiers. These are non-identity-bearing additions that do not change the core product type. The invoice's part numbers and specific model descriptions are additional detail not present in certificate, but the core product type 'Rubberhose/Hose' is consistently identifiable.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'Rubberhose' found in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions (fittings, plastic qualifiers) do not affect MATCH

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as 'Rubberhose & Hose Plastic w or wo fittings' in two lines (980pcs and 900pcs). Invoice lists 5 positions: Pos 1 'Hydraulic hose High Pressure', Pos 2-5 all 'Rubberhose'. The identity-bearing main designation 'Rubberhose' is explicitly and exactly present in the invoice (Pos 2-5). Pos 1 'Hydraulic hose' contains 'hose' and is a type of hose product consistent with the certificate's collective description. The total pieces in the invoice are 100+300+480+500+500 = 1880 PCE, matching certificate's 980+900 = 1880 pcs. The certificate uses a generic collective description, and the core product identification 'Rubberhose' / 'Hose' is clearly present in the invoice. MATCH per 4.3.3 and 4.3.4.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because 'Hose Plastic' is not found verbatim in invoice
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The identity-bearing main designation 'Rubberhose' IS found in the invoice. 'Hose Plastic' is part of the combined certificate description and 'hose' appears in Pos 1 'Hydraulic hose'. Per 4.3.4, the qualifier 'Plastic' is a non-identity-bearing addition. The core product type is identifiable.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Line 1: 148,9kg GW; Line 2: 107,1kg GW; Total GW: 256.0 kg. Also: 2 pallets, 980pcs + 900pcs
checkpoints.invoice_value: (kg) 176.64; (kg) 256.08; No of Pallets: 2; No of Packages: 24. Per-line weights: 14.60+20.10+73.44+33.50+35.00 = 176.64 kg

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains: 148,9kg and 107,1kg with GW designation.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate box 7 has two weight values: 148.9 kg and 107.1 kg, both GW. Total GW = 148.9 + 107.1 = 256.0 kg.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 - Direct identification of 148.9 kg in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: The value 148.9 does not appear anywhere in the invoice.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 - Direct identification of 107.1 kg in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: The value 107.1 does not appear anywhere in the invoice.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 - Direct identification of total 256.0 kg in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Search for 256.0 or 256.00 kg in invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice page 3 shows '(kg) 256.08'. This is 256.08 vs certificate total 256.0. Difference is 0.08 kg, which is 0.031% of 256.0 — within ±0.1% tolerance.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 256.08 (invoice) vs 256.0 (certificate) is within ±0.1% tolerance.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate total GW: 148.9 + 107.1 = 256.0 kg. Invoice (kg) value: 256.08 kg. Difference: 0.08 kg. Percentage: 0.08/256.0 = 0.031%. This is within ±0.1% tolerance.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate also states '2 pallets'. Invoice page 3 states 'No of Pallets: 2'.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 2 pallets. Invoice: No of Pallets: 2. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 980pcs + 900pcs = 1880 pcs total. Invoice: 100+300+480+500+500 = 1880 PCE.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate total pieces: 980+900 = 1880. Invoice total pieces: 100+300+480+500+500 = 1880. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 weight values used as verification-grounding quantity
Undantag 3D - Summation allowed for certificate's two GW lines to get total
Tolerance ±0.1% applied to total GW comparison
Multiple quantities - at least one verified (total GW, pallets, pieces all match)

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 has 148.9 kg and 107.1 kg GW, totaling 256.0 kg GW. Invoice page 3 has '(kg) 256.08'. The difference of 0.08 kg (0.031%) is within the ±0.1% tolerance. Additionally, certificate states 2 pallets (matched by invoice 'No of Pallets: 2') and 980+900=1880 pcs (matched by invoice 100+300+480+500+500=1880 PCE). Multiple quantities verified. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because individual line weights 148.9 and 107.1 cannot be found in invoice
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per 4.4.3.1, when multiple quantity values exist, at least one must be verified. The total GW (256.0 vs 256.08) is within tolerance. Additionally pallets and piece counts match exactly. The certificate's line-level GW breakdown (148.9/107.1) need not individually appear in the invoice when the total matches.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The invoice has two (kg) rows: 176.64 and 256.08 — 176.64 could be NW and 256.08 could be GW, creating ambiguity
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The invoice does not label these as GW or NW explicitly. However, the certificate total GW is 256.0 kg, and 256.08 matches within tolerance. The value 176.64 is the sum of per-line weights (14.60+20.10+73.44+33.50+35.00=176.64) which appears to represent net product weight. The certificate declares GW and 256.0 matches 256.08. Per 4.4.4, difference in weight category labeling does not in itself cause MISMATCH when the numeric value and unit match.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Country Of Origin: SE (per all 5 line items)

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin declaration in invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: All 5 invoice line items have 'Country Of Origin: SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden.
Sweden = SE (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). This is an allowed normalization per 4.5.4.

comparison_steps.description: Check if all items share the same origin.
comparison_steps.detail: All 5 invoice positions have 'Country Of Origin: SE'. Single origin across all items.

rules_applied.description: Origin explicitly stated per line item as 'Country Of Origin: SE'
ISO country code normalization: Sweden = SE

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice: all line items have 'Country Of Origin: SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden. Normalization per 4.5.4 allows this equivalence. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No LC reference found in certificate.

Certificate file (Document A) contains ORIGINAL (page 1) and COPY (page 2). Using ORIGINAL. Invoice file (Document B) contains 3-page invoice CD711895. Certificate remarks 'CD711895' matches invoice number. Pairing is clear.
All three criteria met: invoice number CD711895 matches, consignor HydraSpecma AB found in invoice, consignee Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S found in invoice.
HydraSpecma AB found in invoice footer Invoice Address block.
SE prefix in VAT number and IBAN confirms Sweden.
Customer field 'Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S.' used as primary billing party.
'Rubberhose' found explicitly in invoice Pos 2-5. 'Hose' found in Pos 1.
Box 7 contains 148.9 kg and 107.1 kg GW.
Certificate has two GW lines totaling 256.0 kg. Invoice shows 256.08 kg.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Multiple quantities - at least one verified
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Total GW matches within tolerance. Pallets (2=2) and pieces (1880=1880) also match.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren HydraSpecma AB i Sverige, mottagaren Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S. i Turkiet, varubeskrivningen (gummislangar), kvantiteten (256 kg bruttovikt, 2 pallar, 1880 stycken) och ursprungslandet Sverige kan alla verifieras i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
non_blocking_observations: Invoice page 3 has two (kg) values: 176.64 and 256.08. These are not labeled as GW/NW but the certificate total GW 256.0 matches 256.08 within tolerance.
Certificate uses collective description 'Rubberhose & Hose Plastic w or wo fittings' while invoice has specific part numbers and more detailed descriptions.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.invoice_value: HydraSpecma AB, Box 164, SE-401 22 GÖTEBORG (Invoice Address footer); VAT.no SE5560B9955001
sections.rule_applied: Consignor-namn identifierat direkt i fakturans Invoice Address-block. Land Sverige verifierat via SE-prefix i momsnummer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'HydraSpecma AB' återfinns exakt i fakturans sidfot under 'Invoice Address'. Adressen 'Box 164' stämmer överens. Land Sverige bekräftas genom SE-prefix i VAT-nummer SE5560B9955001 och IBAN.

sections.certificate_value: Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S, 45230. Akhisar, Turkiet
sections.invoice_value: Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S., 45230 AKHISAR, TURKIET (Customer)
sections.rule_applied: Consignee identifierad i fakturans Customer-fält. Namnmatchning efter normalisering av interpunktion. Land Turkiet verifierat.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S' matchar fakturans 'Customer: Ergun Hidrolik San. Tic A.S.' efter normalisering av avslutande punkt. Adress och land 'Turkiet'/'TURKIET' överensstämmer.

sections.certificate_value: 980pcs, Rubberhose & Hose Plastic w or wo fittings; 900pcs, Rubberhose & Hose Plastic w or wo fittings
sections.invoice_value: Pos 1: Hydraulic hose High Pressure 100 PCE; Pos 2-5: Rubberhose 300+480+500+500 PCE
sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Rubberhose' identifierad i fakturans artikelrader. Certifikatets samlande varubeskrivning täcker fakturans detaljerade produktrader.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets produktbeteckning 'Rubberhose & Hose Plastic w or wo fittings' har sin identitetsbärande kärna 'Rubberhose' explicit i fakturans fyra artikelrader (Pos 2-5). Pos 1 'Hydraulic hose High Pressure' innehåller 'hose'. Totalantal 980+900=1880 pcs matchar fakturans 100+300+480+500+500=1880 PCE.

sections.rule_applied: Total bruttovikt 256,0 kg verifierad mot fakturans 256,08 kg inom tolerans ±0,1%. Antal pallar och styck matchar exakt.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger 148,9 kg + 107,1 kg = 256,0 kg GW. Fakturans sida 3 visar '(kg) 256.08'. Avvikelsen 0,08 kg (0,031%) ligger inom tillåten tolerans ±0,1%. Antal pallar: certifikat 2, faktura 2. Antal styck: certifikat 1880, faktura 1880. Alla kvantiteter verifierade.

sections.rule_applied: ISO-landskod SE normaliserad till Sweden. Enhetligt ursprung SE för alla artiklar i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' i ruta 3 verifieras mot fakturans 'Country Of Origin: SE' som anges per artikelrad. SE är ISO-koden för Sverige. Enhetligt ursprung, alla artiklar har SE.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result is IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation is AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. All confidence values ≥ 0.85. Consistency verified.
